OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Henry Kwan.
Attorney Bill Ford appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Emigdio Gomez is present.
Attorney Philip Morgan representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jim Watson, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of JAN-09-2012 is vacated.
